name: password-finder
description: Dump stored Wi-Fi hotspot passwords, Audi Connect credentials, and other stored secrets from the MMI's persistence partitions. Read-only — changes nothing on the unit.
author: dspl1236
scripts: password_dump.sh - Scan persistence for stored credentials, write to SD
searches: /mnt/persist/ — alt persistence path on some variants
Hotspot/WLAN config files (wpa_supplicant patterns, hostapd configs)
Bluetooth pairing keys (link keys for paired phones)
notes: Inspired by the 'Password' feature in jilleb/mib2-toolbox. On MIB2 that feature extracts stored hotspot passwords. On MMI3G the persistence paths differ but similar data exists. This module does a read-only scan — it writes only to the SD card, never modifies the MMI's flash storage.
credits: Concept from jilleb/mib2-toolbox Password screen. MMI3G-specific implementation.
